query:
SELECT 'users' AS tbl, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM users
UNION ALL
SELECT 'puzzle_attempts', COUNT(*) FROM puzzle_attempts
UNION ALL
SELECT 'cycle_history', COUNT(*) FROM cycle_history
UNION ALL
SELECT 'active_sessions', COUNT(*) FROM active_sessions
UNION ALL
SELECT 'puzzle_attempts distinct users', COUNT(DISTINCT userId) FROM puzzle_attempts WHERE userId IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'puzzle_attempts distinct devices', COUNT(DISTINCT deviceId) FROM puzzle_attempts WHERE userId IS NULL AND deviceId IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'users with name set', COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND name != ''
UNION ALL
SELECT 'users created today', COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE DATE(createdAt) = CURDATE();
